title: Bredemeyera altissima
taxonomy: Bredemeyera altissima is classified within the family Polygalaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the milkwort family. This plant is a part of the genus Bredemeyera, which includes several species native to Central and South America. The Polygalaceae family consists of approximately 830 species of plants, with many found in tropical and subtropical regions. Bredemeyera altissima is an example of a plant that has adapted to these environments, with its specific characteristics allowing it to thrive in areas with high temperatures and humidity. By understanding its classification, we can better comprehend the unique features and evolutionary history of this plant.
